summary: Full e2e validation of Nairobi Rental Management MVP. 34/34 backend pytest tests passed. Frontend UI tested: landlord register, property/unit/tenant creation, monthly rent generation, tenant login, full M-Pesa STK Push payment (DEMO MODE auto-callback succeeded with receipt DEMO034440 in ~5s, bill auto-marked paid, tenant dashboard reflects 'Bills Settled: 1'). MongoDB _id is properly excluded from all responses. Role-based access control verified.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> rendered as child of <option> in unit dropdown (Tenants.jsx line 73). This is from the dev instrumentation wrapping option label text inside a <span>. Browsers strip it, but it logs a console error in dev. Consider rendering plain text in <option> children.
Radix Dialog warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' on Property, Unit, Bill and Tenant dialogs. PayDialog has it. Add <DialogDescription> for a11y.

action_items: (Minor) Add <DialogDescription> to Property/Unit/Bill/Tenant dialogs for accessibility (resolves Radix console warning).
(Minor) Fix React hydration warning on Tenants page unit-select <option> (avoid <span> children inside <option>).
critical_code_review_comments: MPESA_CALLBACK_BASE_URL is empty in .env - in production (non-demo mode) Safaricom callback URL would be invalid. Demo mode handles this in-process, but main agent should document/validate this before going live.
payments_router._process_callback_payload: when CallbackMetadata Amount is 0 (demo mode), code falls back to payment['amount']; that's correct. Good.

issues_router.update_issue allows ANY caretaker in the landlord's network to update any issue (even if assigned_to belongs to a different caretaker). This is by-design per code comment ('allow caretakers in the same landlord network to claim') and tested successfully.
auth.py uses bcrypt directly (not passlib) - safer with newer bcrypt versions; good.
No HTTP 201 used for resource creation - everything returns 200. Consistent but not REST-strict (acceptable for MVP).
Bills _compute_status updates DB inside a GET handler (read mutates write). Acceptable but consider a scheduled task to mark overdue.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on tested flows (register, property, unit, tenant, bills gen, tenant login, M-Pesa pay end-to-end)

test_credentials: Landlord (seed): land@demo.com / demo123. Test-run landlord & tenant created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up. Frontend test created ui_landlord_<ts>@demo.com / ui_tenant_<ts>@demo.com (left in DB, harmless).
seed_data_creation: Backend tests auto-create TEST_ prefixed landlord/tenant/caretaker/property/unit/bills/issues and clean up via test_zz_cleanup. Frontend test left ui_landlord_<ts> and ui_tenant_<ts> users (not cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_rental_management.py covers full lifecycle including M-Pesa demo callback (sleeps up to 12s polling). All critical APIs and role-based access control validated. M-Pesa demo mode end-to-end verified both via API and via UI (PayDialog polling). Issues UI flow: the 'New Issue' button data-testid was not found by automation - either it doesn't exist or has a different name on Issues.jsx; main agent should ensure data-testid='new-issue-button' is on the trigger. Issue API itself works (covered by 7 backend tests).
rca of the issue: No critical issues found. Only minor accessibility-level console warnings.
